name: build-thermodb-from-reference
description: Build and validate pyThermoDB objects from reference YAML.

interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex workflow for building component, mixture, and constants ThermoDB objects from inline or file-based reference YAML, with examples and a validation script for pyThermoDB projects.
defaultPrompt: Build a pyThermoDB object from reference YAML.
Show how to retrieve TableData or matrix values.
